bird.name: 大鳳冠雉
bird.summary: 大鳳冠雉（學名：Crax rubra），俗稱大寶冠鳥，是一種大型的鳳冠雉科鳥類。 特徵 大鳳冠雉主要是黑色的，喙上有黃色的瘤，冠上的羽毛彎曲。牠們長78-92厘米，重達4.8公斤。雌性大鳳冠雉有三個形態：斑紋形態的頸部、展翼、翼及尾巴都有斑紋；赤色形態的整體都呈赤褐色，尾巴有斑…

relations.subject: 大鳳冠雉
relations.evidence: This species is threatened by loss of habitat and hunting, and the International Union for Conservation of Nature has rated its conservation status as "vulnerable"
relations.object_summary: 直接猎捕或误捕造成额外死亡。

relations.subject: 大鳳冠雉
relations.evidence: Due to ongoing habitat loss and overhunting in some areas, the great curassow is evaluated as Vulnerable on the IUCN Red List of Threatened Species. It is listed on Appendix III of CITES in Costa Rica, Guatemala, Colombia and Honduras
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。
